items.content_html: An Obsidian.md plugin randomly exposing you to your cards. Supports habits, to-dos, spaced repetition flashcards, iterative reading and more.
items.title: koljapluemer/obsidian-the-queue: An Obsidian.md plugin randomly exposing you to your cards. Supports habits, to-dos, spaced repetition flashcards, iterative reading and more.

items.content_html: The Sync Snowflake plugin seamlessly integrates Obsidian with GitLab, offering a robust solution for syncing your notes and folders to a GitLab repository. This plugin ensures your notes are backed up and version-controlled, leveraging GitLab REST-api's capabilities directly from Obsidian.
items.title: cnuebred/obsidian-snowflake: The Sync Snowflake plugin seamlessly integrates Obsidian with GitLab, offering a robust solution for syncing your notes and folders to a GitLab repository. This plugin ensures your notes are backed up and version-controlled, leveraging GitLab REST-api's capabilities directly from Obsidian.
